markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Emily LeGrand for the Client Operations Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Emily LeGrand, a CS Program Manager at Rapid7, led a major customer health score initiative, unifying siloed teams (Data, Product, Services) to define metrics and build dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Her core skill is cross-functional alignment, using design thinking workshops to build consensus and an executive sponsor to drive decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [LeGrand self-identified an early mistake of over-commitment; her solution was to create a formal "Strategic Initiatives Intake Process" to vet projects by effort and impact, ensuring focus on top priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [The hiring company, a 80-person startup, needs to shift from reactive "whack-a-mole" operations to proactive, scalable systems to support its services business and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

## Topics

### Company Context & Role Need

  - [Bridget McGillivray (VP of Operations) manages all business functions (Finance, HR, IT, Legal, Customer Ops) for the 80-person startup.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**Primary Focus:** Customer Operations, as the services team (50 people) generates all company revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Key Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [**Scalability:** The company has scaled linearly for 6 months and needs "step functions" in efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
      - [**Proactive Planning:** Operations are reactive ("whack-a-mole"); the goal is to think 6+ months ahead.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [**Product Launch:** New products will create two distinct business units, requiring different operational models.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [**Startup Culture:** Requires high autonomy and a "go for it" mentality. Small efforts yield outsized impact ("amplified impact").](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

### Candidate Experience: Rapid7 Customer Health Score

  - [**Background:** 7 years at Accenture (federal focus) → Rapid7 (commercial focus).](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Current Role:** CS Program Manager (new role since April) executing strategic initiatives for the VP of Operations.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Primary Project:** Building a customer health score from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Goal:** Unify siloed teams (Data, Product, Services) around a single definition of customer health.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Product adoption, support tickets, NPS, and CSM ("Advisor") sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Dashboards for CSMs and leadership to identify at-risk customers (for churn mitigation) and expansion opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Key Contributions:**](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Cross-functional Alignment:** Facilitated design thinking workshops to build consensus on health indicators and their weighting.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [**Executive Sponsorship:** Used the VP of CS to champion the project, tying it to company OKRs to drive buy-in.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [**Process Improvement:** Created a formal "Strategic Initiatives Intake Process" to vet new projects by effort and impact, ensuring focus on top priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [**Collaboration with Data Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Process:** LeGrand provides UI/UX mockups (e.g., PowerPoint) to define requirements, leaving the technical implementation to the data team.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Negotiation:** Balances development effort vs. user experience (e.g., chose Salesforce over Gainsight for a 5x faster build).](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
      - [**Tools:** Gainsight, Tableau, Salesforce, Gong, Jira.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Calibrate with Andy (hiring manager) on the role's scope, specifically regarding dashboard development capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Follow up with Emily LeGrand within a few days.](https://fathom.video/share/_njEukei9D_JdhVufeZ2yjy9TiAsw5jD?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)
